statements.__comment: Project `_ont_has_mfa` on AWSUser from the :MFA_DEVICE edge. AWS does not expose an MFA boolean on the IAM user (the credential report is not ingested), so we derive it from the presence of any AWSMfaDevice attached to the user.
Project `_ont_active` on AWSUser. A user is considered active if they have used the console at least once (passwordlastused_dt is set) OR own at least one access key whose status is Active.
statements.query: MATCH (u:AWSUser) SET u._ont_active = (u.passwordlastused_dt IS NOT NULL) OR EXISTS((u)<-[:AWS_ACCESS_KEY]-(:AccountAccessKey {status: 'Active'}))
